assertions.text: Skill reads the provided screenshot file
assertions.evidence: Read the screenshot and identified it as '달결' astrology/tarot app with dark theme.

assertions.text: Skill identifies the app's domain category
assertions.evidence: Identified domain as astrology/fortune app. Benchmarked against Co-Star, Sanctuary, Golden Thread Tarot.

assertions.text: Skill performs trend research (WebSearch) before scoring
assertions.evidence: 6 sources cited including astrology app trends 2025, dark mode best practices, 2026 UI/UX trends.
All 8 dimensions scored: Visual Hierarchy 5, Color 6, Typography 5, Spacing 6, Layout 6, Navigation 5, Consistency 7, Trend Alignment 5. Overall 5.6/10.

assertions.text: Skill does NOT request ios-simulator agent since screenshot already provided
assertions.evidence: No ios-simulator request. Proceeded directly to trend research and scoring.
